tools.name: get_my_profile
tools.title: Get my Puzzlecraft profile
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's Puzzlecraft profile: display name, rating, skill tier, total solves, friend code, and Puzzlecraft+ status.

tools.name: get_my_stats
tools.title: Get my Puzzlecraft stats
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's per-puzzle-type rating breakdown from the type leaderboards (crossword, sudoku, nonogram, etc.).

tools.name: get_leaderboard
tools.title: Get Puzzlecraft leaderboard
tools.description: Return the top Puzzlecraft players by overall rating. Use `limit` (1-50, default 10) to control how many rows come back.

limit.description: How many top players to return. Default 10.
